title: Listing monday Docs Across Boards
excerpt: I believe it would be helpful to have a view, dashboard widget, or dedicated space where users can list all monday docs attached to items across boards. Currently, the File Gallery does not support monday docs.

posts.author: Hsinyuan (Hsin-Yuan Fan)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe it would be helpful to have a view, dashboard widget, or dedicated space where users can list all monday docs attached to items across boards. Currently, the File Gallery does not support monday docs.
